response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but his recent focus is on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep, current involvement in enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, robotic arms)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling passion (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication and teaching skills with workshops on web internals and testing
concerns: Recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, with no clear recent JVM or IDE tooling projects
Lack of explicit experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise build tool integration
No evidence of IDE architecture work, language server protocols, or developer-experience optimization in modern Java/Kotlin contexts
